title: melothria javanica
intro: Melothria javanica, also known as the gac fruit or spiny melon, is a type of tropical vine native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high content of beta-carotene and other antioxidants, which help protect the body against free radicals and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Melothria javanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve eye health, and support the immune system. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, juices, and supplements, which can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its nutritional and medicinal benefits.
